case_title: PETER O'DRISCOLL VS. JONAH DEUTSCHMAN et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF O'DRISCOLL, PETER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEUTSCHMAN, JONAH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 930 ELIZABETH STREET, APT. 4, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94114, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF O'DRISCOLL, PETER AS TO DEFENDANT DEUTSCHMAN, JONAH DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT DEUTSCHMAN, JONAH
